message:
fix(connection): remove redundant borrows and suppress clippy lint, fix SSI test setup

connection.rs:
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] to execute_precompiled_prepared_insert
- Remove unnecessary `&` on `cx` parameter across transaction commit/rollback
  paths (begin_pager_txn_with_busy_timeout, rollback, live_vtab_sync_all,
  live_vtab_rollback_all, restore_live_vtab_registry_to, reload_memdb_from_pager,
  live_vtab_commit_all_best_effort, finalize_live_vtab_registry_commit)
- Fix SSI test helpers (ssi_cards, ssi_filter): insert a seed row before
  BEGIN CONCURRENT so the read-only evidence setup asserts on a non-empty
  table, matching the intended snapshot isolation semantics

.beads/issues.jsonl: update issue tracking state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
